case_title: RIOS GUSTAVO VS GAUTHS STELLA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $65.00 FILED BY RIOS GUSTAVO AS TO DEFENDANT GAUTHS STELLA CONSTANTINO PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIOS GUSTAVO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAUTHS STELLA CONSTANTINO PETER $65.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $103.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GAUTHS STELLA CONSTANTINO PETER
